Row.code: let result=Things["HPMC.AddOn.RTMP.Manager"].TriggeredEmailsLog;

/* * @name GetMachineAlarmConfig * @date 24.06.2025 * @author Atharva Mahabal * @return infotable HPMC.AddOn.MachineAlarmHistory.AlarmLog.DS * * return the property which we are using in HPMC.AddOn.RTMP.Manager MachineEmailAlertLog * This service is used in HPMC.AddOn.RTMP.Management.ConfigureEmail.Popup.MU Mashup if you can * replace it you can mostly used to refresh the mashup */
result = Things["HPMC.AddOn.RTMP.Manager"].MachineEmailAlertLog;
// logger.info("Line 1 Test Timer");
